summary: 27 tests passed, 90.0% coverage, all quality gates passed

completion_promises.criterion_text: End-to-end test verifies complete event stream for successful task
completion_promises.evidence: TestEndToEndSuccessfulTask class contains 4 tests: test_complete_event_stream_successful_task verifies full lifecycle (started -> llm calls -> tool execs -> completed), test_all_events_share_same_run_id, test_all_events_share_same_task_id, and test_events_roundtrip_through_jsonl_backend verifying JSONL persistence and readback.

completion_promises.criterion_text: End-to-end test verifies event stream for failed task
completion_promises.evidence: TestEndToEndFailedTask class with 2 tests: test_complete_event_stream_failed_task verifies lifecycle ending with TaskFailedEvent and correct failure_category, test_failed_task_preserves_all_events verifies all events including failure are persisted to JSONL.

completion_promises.criterion_text: NATS unavailable: all events written to local JSONL
completion_promises.evidence: TestNATSUnavailableFallback class with 3 tests: test_events_written_to_jsonl_without_nats (CompositeBackend with only JSONL), test_each_jsonl_line_is_valid_json, and test_nats_unavailable_all_events_still_in_jsonl (NATS throws ConnectionError, all 4 events still in JSONL).

completion_promises.criterion_text: NATS drops mid-run: seamless fallback with warning
completion_promises.evidence: TestNATSMidRunFallback.test_nats_drops_mid_run_events_still_captured: first 2 NATS publishes succeed, events 3-4 fail with ConnectionError. All 4 events land in JSONL. Verifies NATS warning is logged.

completion_promises.criterion_text: No events silently dropped in any failure scenario
completion_promises.evidence: TestNoSilentDrops class with 2 tests: test_no_events_dropped_when_nats_fails (10 events, NATS broken, all 10 in JSONL), test_no_events_dropped_with_failing_custom_backend (failing backend + JSONL + NullEmitter, all 3 events captured by both healthy backends).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Concurrent workers produce independent, non-corrupted events
completion_promises.evidence: TestConcurrentWorkerSafety with 2 tests: test_three_workers_independent_events (3 async workers, 12 events total, each event's task_id and run_id consistently paired per worker, 4 events per worker), test_no_cross_contamination_between_workers (15 events from 3 workers, input_tokens range verified per worker).

completion_promises.criterion_text: A/B data: same task produces comparable metrics under different profiles
completion_promises.evidence: TestABComparisonData with 3 tests: test_same_task_different_profiles_produce_completed_events (both runs produce TaskCompletedEvent with same task_id), test_input_tokens_available_for_both_runs (500 vs 800 tokens), test_latency_ms_available_for_comparison (4 latency values per profile, p50 computation verified).

TestDigestValidationBoundary with 2 tests: test_digest_at_exactly_max_tokens_accepted (generates text at 700 tokens, validates no warning), test_digest_at_701_tokens_triggers_warning (generates text exceeding 700 tokens, validates warning is set and contains 'exceeds').

TestPhase1MigrationPreservation with 4 tests: test_rules_bundle_and_digest_coexist (both 'Player Digest' and 'Full Rules Bundle' in assembled output), test_prompt_profile_tagged_as_digest_rules_bundle (last_profile == DIGEST_RULES_BUNDLE), test_events_tagged_with_digest_rules_bundle_profile (LLMCallEvent and TaskCompletedEvent carry 'digest+rules_bundle'), test_default_profile_is_digest_rules_bundle.

TestAsyncEmissionNonBlocking with 4 tests: test_emit_is_async_coroutine (verifies asyncio.iscoroutine), test_emit_does_not_block_caller (3 emits under 1s), test_fire_and_forget_pattern (5 create_task fire-and-forget emissions), test_concurrent_emit_with_simulated_work (5 concurrent LLM calls with emission, all under 1s).
